Container.Name: PrintHub
Container.Overview: Privacy-first, self-hosted resin production queue. Customers upload STLs and each copy moves through Queue, Printing, Washing, Curing, and Ready while files stay on your array. Built-in accounts, resin estimates, plate planning, and opt-in telemetry. The first person to open the web UI claims the admin account, so open it right after starting the container.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the PrintHub web interface.

Config.Name: App data
Config.Description: PrintHub's database and settings. Keep on appdata.

Config.Name: Print files
Config.Description: Share where your STL files live. PrintHub keeps them as plain files organized by resin production stage.
